default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss image guidelines and content collaboration between Abnormal Security and growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Emily will create blog post images using Abnormal Security's branded templates for Twitter, LinkedIn, and blog cover sizes](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Sydney to send article headlines to Emily for image creation before submitting full articles](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Emily will review the two articles Sydney sent on Monday and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Emily to confirm with Jade about the image creation process for scaling up to 10+ articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)

## Topics

### Image Guidelines and Creation Process

  - [Abnormal Security uses branded asset templates approved by creative team](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Three image sizes: Twitter, LinkedIn, and square blog cover](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Emily typically creates images using templates, then gets design approval](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Style guide and template links shared, but access issues encountered](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Decided: Emily will create images based on headlines Sydney provides](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Content Submission and Feedback

  - [Sydney sent two articles on Monday via Slack (external\_abnormal\_growth channel)](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Emily will prioritize reviewing these articles](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [Sydney plans to send 10 more articles this week](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Agreed to send headlines to Emily on Mondays for image creation](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)

### Scaling Content Production

  - [Sydney anticipates sending at least 10 articles per week when fully ramped](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Emily to confirm with Jade if current image creation process works at scale](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Concern about potential increased workload for both teams if process changes](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)

### Communication and Collaboration

  - [Emily offered to be the main point of contact for content team questions](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [Encouraged Sydney to reach out via Slack for any queries](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Emphasized open communication and "dumb question amnesty" policy](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Emily to review the two articles Sydney sent on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [Emily to confirm with Jade about scaling image creation process](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Sydney to send article headlines to Emily on Mondays](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Emily to create images based on headlines and get design approval](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Sydney to continue content production, aiming for 10 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Both to maintain open communication via Slack for questions and updates](https://fathom.video/share/xM2U3LxcHD6ngPsMyx-9cgeMyYxvGeFr?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

action_items.description: Check 2 articles Sydney sent Monday in Slack (external normal growth group chat)
Confirm w/ Jade (1:1 tmrw) re: image creation process at scale (10+ articles/week)
Send headlines for next batch of articles to Emily (Mon or Wed)
